Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "SNACKMAN-0810" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Snackman.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Patched $1F8B to RTS ($60) to skip high score clearing and loading. Also NOP'd out the call to the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $3B05 to remove high score saving. Homepage: https://github.com/camperjohn64/commodore64
